calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL FIRESTONE, Esq. of Marvin Firtestone, MD-JD & Associates (Tel: 650-212-4900) for petitioner Roozbeh Badii, M.D.;
Atty. CAITLIN ROSS, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 415-510-3615) for respondent Medical Board of California.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ROOZBEH BADII, M.D.'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is granted. The case is remanded for respondent to impose a new penalty on petitioner.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Mary Ferreira, CSR No. 10553, Email: mferreira@calreporter.net, Tel: 510-928-6268 (302/RBU)
